overall.description: A first-person walk through a dark dystopian industrial facility during a storm, beginning in a candle-lit interior with people gathered around fires, moving through rain-soaked corridors with burning debris, passing bodies and graffiti-covered walls, and ending at a waterfront overlook with a burning ship visible in the stormy sea.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial interior with fire lighting

events.description: begins walking forward through dark corridor toward distant light
rain becomes visible falling in the corridor ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dark industrial corridor toward a distant fire light

notable_agents.action: person standing near fire light in the distance

entered.detail: dark metal and concrete walls of industrial facility
warm orange fire light illuminating the dark space
rusted metal scaffolding and pipes along the corridor

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dark industrial interior lit by warm fire glow. The camera walks forward through a narrow corridor with metal scaffolding visible on the right, approaching a distant light source where a person stands near the fire.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked industrial corridor with burning debris

events.description: passing a burning fire on the left side of the corridor
lighting shifts from warm fire glow to cooler ambient light

agents.ego_description: walking through the rainy corridor, passing burning debris on the left

entered.detail: large pile of burning materials casting orange light and sparks
heavy rain falling through the corridor
large industrial pipes and cables overhead

segments.scene_description: Moving through a rain-soaked industrial corridor, the camera passes a large burning debris pile on the left that casts flickering orange light. The environment transitions from warm firelight to cooler ambient lighting as the camera progresses deeper into the facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with graffiti and scaffolding

events.description: encountering a body slumped against the wall on the left
approaching a downward sloping concrete ramp

agents.ego_description: walking past industrial scaffolding and a body on the ground, approaching a downward ramp

notable_agents.action: unconscious or dead person in yellow hard hat slumped against concrete wall

entered.detail: concrete wall with large green spray-painted symbol
concrete block structure with body leaning against it
extensive metal scaffolding and construction materials
downward sloping concrete ramp leading to lower level

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a brighter industrial maintenance area with green graffiti on the walls and extensive metal scaffolding. The camera passes a body wearing a yellow hard hat slumped against a concrete bench on the left, then approaches a downward ramp leading to a lower level.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront overlook with stormy sea view

events.description: exiting the industrial facility to the waterfront overlook
burning ship becomes visible in the stormy sea distance

agents.ego_description: descending a concrete ramp toward a large opening overlooking a stormy sea with a burning ship

notable_agents.action: body in safety vest lying on the concrete ramp

entered.detail: rough ocean waves visible through the large opening
large vessel on fire in the distance with orange flames and smoke
large industrial door frame opening to the exterior
thick industrial cables hanging across the opening

segments.scene_description: Descending the concrete ramp past bodies in safety vests, the camera exits the industrial facility through a large metal gate frame. The scene opens to a stormy waterfront overlook with heavy rain, rough seas, and a large ship burning in the distance, visible through hanging industrial cables.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit industrial interior into a stormy, open-air waterfront. It begins in a dark corridor illuminated by the warm glow of fires, moving past metal scaffolding toward a distant figure standing in the light. As the camera progresses, the warmth fades into cooler ambient lighting while passing a flickering pile of burning debris in a rain-soaked hallway. The scene then opens into a brighter maintenance area marked by green graffiti and the slumped form of a worker in a yellow hard hat before turning toward a descending concrete ramp. Finally, the camera passes bodies in safety vests and exits through a large metal gate, revealing a heavy rainstorm and a massive ship burning on the rough sea beyond hanging industrial cables.
